# Examples Index

Browse the bundled notebooks to see SEA-eco in action. These copies render in
the docs via `nbsphinx` and are not executed during the build (`nbsphinx_execute
= "never"`). For interactive exploration, open the originals in the `examples/`
directory.

```{toctree}
:maxdepth: 1
:caption: Basic usage

examples/basic_usage
```

```{toctree}
:maxdepth: 1
:caption: Signal processing: correlation and alignment

examples/signal_processing_correlation
```

```{toctree}
:maxdepth: 1
:caption: Third-party readers (Nion)

examples/nion_reader
```
